title: 3 Idiots
synopsis: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them to think differently.

title: Dangal
synopsis: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat and his two wrestler daughters struggle towards glory at the Commonwealth Games in the face of societal oppression.

title: Sholay
synopsis: After his family is murdered by a notorious bandit, a former police officer enlists the services of two outlaws to capture the bandit.

title: Andhadhun
synopsis: A series of mysterious events change the life of a blind pianist who must now report a crime that he should not have seen.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
synopsis: When Raj meets Simran in Europe, it isn't love at first sight but when Simran moves to India for an arranged marriage, love finds its way.

title: Tumbbad
synopsis: A mythological story about a family who builds a temple for Hastar, a monster who should never be worshipped, in search of unlimited wealth.

title: Vikram
synopsis: A special agent investigates a murder committed by a masked group of serial killers and uncovers a massive drug syndicate.

title: Nayakan
synopsis: A common man rises to become a powerful underworld don in Mumbai, loved by the poor and feared by his enemies.

title: Jai Bhim
synopsis: A courageous lawyer fights for justice when a tribal man is falsely accused and disappears from police custody.

title: Ratsasan
synopsis: An aspiring film director becomes a police officer and tracks down a psychotic serial killer targeting schoolgirls.
Two high school sweethearts meet at a reunion after 22 years and reminisce about their past relationship.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
synopsis: A child from a tribal village grows up and learns of his royal heritage and the legacy of his father, the legendary warrior Baahubali.

title: RRR
synopsis: A fictitious story about two legendary revolutionaries and their journey away from home before they started fighting for their country in the 1920s.

title: Mahanati
synopsis: A biography of Savitri, an iconic South Indian actress who ruled the film industry but faced a tragic personal downfall.

title: Sita Ramam
synopsis: An orphan soldier receives a letter from a girl named Sita, which changes his life. When he goes to meet her, he discovers a beautiful love story.

title: Drishyam
synopsis: A cable TV operator goes to extreme lengths to shield his family from punishment after they accidentally commit a crime.

title: Kumbalangi Nights
synopsis: The story of four brothers living in Kumbalangi who share a love-hate relationship, and how their lives change when love enters their home.

title: Manjummel Boys
synopsis: A group of friends from a small town in Kerala embark on a trip to Kodaikanal, but things turn perilous when one of them falls into the Guna Caves.

title: Premam
synopsis: A young man finds love at different stages of his life, discovering himself, friendship, and heartbreak along the way.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
synopsis: Rocky, a young orphan rising in the underworld, disguises himself as a laborer in the gold mines of Kolar to assassinate a brutal oppressor.

title: Kantara
synopsis: When greed triggers a conflict between villagers and a forest officer, a tribal man channels the local deity to defend his village.

title: Lucia
synopsis: An usher suffering from insomnia is given a special pill that allows him to dream of a parallel life, but his dream life begins to blur with reality.
